title: Gorify
description: Add blood, bleedings, blood traces and executions on kills. (purely cosmetic)
body:
Gorify is a datapack that adds purely cosmetic gore effects to Minecraft vanilla. Blood, execution, bleedings, falling impacts, suffocation and more… > FABRIC/IRIS/SODIUM 26.1 bug: currently, block_display are not rendering properly, making the blood traces blue. It should be fixed quickly by the team. Be patient =) ## Features - Blood particules on damage dealt / taken (redstone block particle) - Blood fountain on mob execution as a finisher - 4 Bleedings intensity depending on the player health (regen your hearts to stop the bleedings) - Cuts bleedings: constant bleedings for fiew seconds when hit by a sword/axe/tool - Special bleedings in water (red dust_color_transition) - Bubble particules on suffocation - Blood traces on bleedings / damage (60 seconds of lifetime, then despawn) - Entity corpses stay longer on the ground (1 seconds of lifetime, then despawn) - Dust particules and crash impact on heavy fall damage ## Datapack's Options In game, use: ```/function fkgm:options/get```
Patreon Supporters - **26.1 (01/04/2026):** Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.11 corpses (06/02/2026):** Setsu-P, varinyc, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.11 (18/12/2025):** Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P, nfnpgllxhn - **1.21.9 (01/10/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, varinyc, Setsu-P, Wani P, Lionel Felke - **1.21.6 Trace V2 (28/07/2025):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.6 (2025-07-11):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.5 (2025-06-07):** CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Setsu-P, varinyc, Wani P - **1.21.2 (2024-11-07):** Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Azerxim, Aidan McCreary, varinyc, Setsu-P, Maximilian Adler, ODS, Jamie B - **1.21 (2024-06-18):** 아아앨, Screaming Man, ZMH, CYKLOPPS, Darklad32, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, EXcore, Setsu-P - **1.20.5 (2024-05-22):** Angelo Russo, 아아앨, EXcore, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, Memick Kung, Aidan McCreary, Setsu-P - **1.20.3 (2023-12-22):** Angelo Russo, 깔수, Screaming Man, ZMH, Darklad32, CYKLOPPS, God Emperor Leto II Atriedes - **1.20 (2023-06-14):** Delivator, Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Phantom-Glitch-Wolf, John Stampe, 깔수, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Yokie - **Gorify V2 (2023-02-08):** Jonathan Fanelli, Angelo Russo, Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, ZMH, Deadlot3, Samantha Flanary - **Combat Bleeding (2022-09-01):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, Peter Schubert, ooF, Tân Huỳnh - **1.19 (2022-06-14):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, ooF, Tân Huỳnh - **1.18 (2021-12-08):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, Peter Schuber - **1.17 (2022-03-08):** Screaming Man, Dorian Dejean, Peter Schubert
Patreon Version The free versions are designed to be fun and fully playable. The Patreon version is for players and server owners who want more control, comfort, and flexibility through an in-game settings menu to tweak the parameters live, without file editing. Becoming a Gold Patreon also means: - Getting access to every Patreon versions of every projects. - Getting your name listed in each project and on this page (see above). - Supporting long-term development, updates, and new features 💛
Mod Version Mod packaging is designed to be more convenient for your installations. Executed on the server side, it does not need to be installed on the client side. Keep in mind that inside the mod is simply a datapack. In addition, interactions between too many mods can degrade the functioning of one or more mods.
Issue / Bug This pack require critical features. If any of your mods mess up with those, it may break. - scoreboard for entities (used for blood traces and executions). - armor_stand (execution) and block_display (for blood traces) entities. - entities' position xyz in data Pos[], to check if they are in water and decide which particle to use. Sodium 26.1 seems to have some issues with block_display colors, making the traces appearing blue instead. Can't do much about this for now. Waiting fix. (bug found by UANe100)
